title: BEM-840 ingest Claude response
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/protocols','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 06:00 (UTC+3)'
def read(p):
    p=Path(p)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
real=[]; blockers=[]
mail_dir=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt')
if mail_dir.exists():
    for p in sorted(mail_dir.glob('*')):
        if p.is_file():
            txt=read(p); up=txt.upper(); low=(p.name+' '+txt).lower()
            bad='NOT CLAUDE APPROVAL' in up or 'RUNTIME BLOCKER' in up or 'not treat this as claude' in low
            ok=('CLAUDE RESPONSE' in up and 'DECISION:' in up)
            item={'path':str(p),'preview':txt[:1500]}
            if bad: blockers.append(item)
            elif ok: real.append(item)
latest=real[-1] if real else None
if latest:
    status='real_claude_response_ingested'
    blocker=None
    decision='CHANGE_REQUIRED' if 'CHANGE_REQUIRED' in latest['preview'].upper() else ('BLOCKED' if 'BLOCKED' in latest['preview'].upper() else ('APPROVED' if 'APPROVED' in latest['preview'].upper() else 'MESSAGE'))
else:
    status='real_claude_response_not_found'
    blocker={'code':'REAL_CLAUDE_RESPONSE_NOT_FOUND','message':'Operator says bem840 response exists, but repository scan did not find CLAUDE RESPONSE + DECISION marker.'}
    decision='UNKNOWN'
protocol=Path('governance/protocols/BEM840_GPT_CLAUDE_RUNTIME_DIAGNOSIS_PROTOCOL.md')
protocol.write_text('# BEM-840 | GPT + Claude Runtime Diagnosis Protocol'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'| Поле | Согласованная позиция | Доказательство |'+sep+'|---|---|---|'+sep+'| Реальный ответ Claude | '+('Да' if latest else 'Нет')+' | '+(latest['path'] if latest else 'не найден')+' |'+sep+'| Decision | '+decision+' | Маркер DECISION в mailbox |'+sep+'| Root cause | Claude Code Action падает до ответа | По сообщению Claude: workflow стартует, scripts работают, но action outcome=failure |'+sep+'| Вероятная причина | истёк CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN или отсутствует ANTHROPIC_API_KEY | Секреты не раскрываются и не записываются в файлы |'+sep+'| Вариант A | Обновить CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN в GitHub Secrets | Бесплатно, требует секретного действия вне repo |'+sep+'| Вариант B | Добавить ANTHROPIC_API_KEY | Платный Anthropic API |'+sep+'| Вариант C | Использовать прямой Claude через GitHub MCP/mailbox как рабочий контур | Уже доказано commit d3b39450 / bem840 mailbox response |'+sep+'| Текущий рабочий выбор | C как немедленный рабочий контур; A как отдельный repair для автономного Claude Code Action | Не блокировать roadmap ожиданием секрета |'+sep+sep+'PASS запрещён до трёх доказательств для автономного action-контура: dispatch result, runtime state, real response. Для согласования протокола сейчас принят рабочий контур C: real Claude mailbox response через GitHub MCP.'+sep)
state={'bem':'BEM-840','status':status,'decision':decision,'latest_real_response':latest,'real_count':len(real),'blocker_count':len(blockers),'selected_route':'C_now_A_later','blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem840_ingest_real_claude_response.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem840_ingest_real_claude_response.md').write_text('# BEM-840 | Ingest Real Claude Response | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md').write_text('Next: produce agreed GPT+Claude protocol using route C; keep route A as secret refresh repair item. Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-840'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Decision: '+decision+sep+'Next: produce agreed GPT+Claude protocol and continue roadmap using route C.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/protocols/BEM840_GPT_CLAUDE_RUNTIME_DIAGNOSIS_PROTOCOL.md','governance/state/bem840_ingest_real_claude_response.json','governance/reports/bem840_ingest_real_claude_response.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem840_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Ingested the first real Claude mailbox response, recorded shared GPT+Claude diagnosis, and selected route C as working contour with route A as separate secret refresh repair')
"""
